prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-SMHAIRBOW-SHIM-AMZ Product Type: HAIR_CLIP Brand (from catalog): Nickelodeon Existing Title: Shimmer and Shine Fashion Accessory Hair Bow Barrette Sparkle Clip Girls Age 3 Description: Is your child a huge fan of Shimmer and Shine? Then this cute Nickelodeon Themed Hair Bow is a perfect accessory for them this year.

The bow measures 4.5" wide, making it a great size for any hairstyle. It comes with a classic style barrette clip to secure it on your child's head, and the bow features characters from the hit Nickelodeon show Shimmer and Shine.

The bow comes with a sparkling embellishment in the middle, and all materials are safe for children ages 3 and up. This a must-have hair accessory for young kids and Shimme and Shine fanatics alike. Search Terms: girls fashion accessories girls costume jewelry girls headbands childrens pretend play sets princess party favors shimmer and shine stocking stuffers for girls bff jewelry girls clip on bows heart shaped hair bows toys dress up pretend play sparkly Features: - SHIMMER AND SHINE BOW - Officially licensed Nickelodeon hair bow features characters from the hit show Shimmer and Shine; Great gift idea for Shimmer and Shine fans - JUMBO BOW - Bow measures 4.5" wide for a fun, unique look; Ideal for any hairstyle and every day use fashion outfits, Sparkle embellishment on front - CLASSIC CLIP ON STYLE - Bow comes with a classic snap clip to attach to hair; Easy for little girls to use to practice their own hair styles - SAFE FOR KIDS - Large Shimmer and Shine bow is safe for children ages 3 and up with adult supervision; Choking hazard (small parts) - SPECIFICATIONS - Officially licensed (Disney Princesses); Pieces included: 3 (headband and 2 bows); Colors: blue, pink; Age recommendation: 3+ years === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
